name: Apple-Brie Cheese Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute 1/2 apple in one tablespoon butter until tender.
2. Beat together two eggs, 2 teaspoons of cream or milk, and salt & pepper until blended but not frothy.
3. Melt 1 1/2 tablespoons butter in an omelette pan over medium heat until foam begins to recede but before the butter starts to color.
4. Pour in the egg mixture and prepare the omelette, beating to lighten it while still allowing it to set on the bottom.
5. Fill with sauteed apple slices and 2 tablespoons of diced Brie cheese cubes.
6. Fold or roll the omelette and slide it onto a heated plate.
